homepage.title: Innovation leader of ovens, incubators and climate chambers
homepage.description: Trust the best: Innovation leader and worldwide manufacturer of ovens, incubators and climate chambers for research, medicine & industry.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Innovation leader of ovens, incubators and climate chambers
Previous slide
Next slide
Slide 1
Slide 2
More than a trade show
discover more
Always ahead for
you.
Discover our NextGen
For over 90 years, we have been developing and manufacturing high-quality climate chambers and temperature control devices for the most demanding applications.
With a strong focus on precision, safety, and sustainability, our solutions simplify your processes and create real added value.
As a family-owned company, we stand for trust, responsibility, and long-term partnerships. This shapes how we work with customers, partners, and employees alike.
164
countries served
550 +
employees
90 +
years of experience
2,250,000 +
devices put into service
Deep-sea research with underwater robots
„A generous usable volume, precise pressure stability, and a wide vacuum range—these are precisely the features that convinced us. The VO101 was the largest model with an integrated vacuum pump and control system that ideally met our requirements.”
Professor Thomas Rauschenbach, Ph.D.,
Director Fraunhofer IOSB-AST

Eco-Friendly
Constant climate chamber HPPeco
Energy efficiency and precision in a new dimension
This powerful climate chamber with Advanced Peltier Technology is around 90% more energy-efficient than compressor-cooled devices, requires no refrigerant, and is therefore easy to maintain.

Freezer ULT
Maximum protection for samples that matter.
Secure ultra-low temperature storage with high thermal stability, integrated safety mechanisms and energy-optimised cooling technology.
Temperature
Environmental test chamber Testa CT / Testa TT
Precise environmental simulation. Reliable results.
TESTA CT and TESTA TT environmental test chambers expand the Memmert portfolio with solutions for precise environmental simulation.
These chambers ensure reliable and reproducible testing conditions.
Temperature
Humidity
CO2 Inkubator neu
Die perfekte Umgebung für optimales Zellwachstum. Sichere, reproduzierbare CO₂-Inkubation mit präziser Feuchtigkeitskontrolle, intelligentem Hygienedesign und fortschrittlichen Konnektivitätsfunktionen.
Temperature
Humidity
CO2
Constant climate chamber HPPeco
Maximum energy efficiency in continuous operation - tailor-made for stability studies according to ICH guidelines, stability tests for cosmetics and foods as well as environmental testing and material testing
Temperature
Humidity
Light
Humidity chamber HCP
Active humidity control creates a controlled environment for accelerated life tests and 85/85 tests.
Temperature
Humidity
Climate Chamber ICH
Unparalleled homogeneity of temperature and humidity. For stability testing according to ICH - WHO - EMA - ASEAN - GMP - GLP – GCCP.
Temperature
Humidity
Light
Universal Oven U
Precise drying, heating, ageing, burn-in and hardening in research, science, industry and quality assurance.
Temperature
Pass-through oven UF TS
The Memmert pass-through oven saves time when loading and reduces the danger of contamination, especially when directly transporting the chamber load between the grey room and the clean room.
Temperature
Paraffin oven UNpa
For many years, and with great precision, our paraffin oven UNpa has served users in science and research in sample preparation.
Temperature
Vacuum oven VO
Digital pressure control ensures rapid and gentle vacuum drying. Its speed-controlled vacuum pump (accessory) saves around 70% energy.

Vacuum
Air change rate chamber UFACR/UFACRplus - D
